full_text:
He Heng 何衡
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Heng (何衡)was born in Yangxia county, Chen commandery. Spoke out against the eunuchs but was imprisoned. He Heng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
